narration: So the output is not just a summary. It is a forensic report, ranked hypotheses, and a patch a human can review immediately.

closure_modifiers.narrative_center: product closure — three-output bundle, not a second climax
closure_modifiers.diff_weight: patch card slightly heavier than report/ranked: full ACCENT label + amber strip on add-lines; report/ranked use MUTED_AMBER labels
closure_modifiers.dimming_rule: beat C dims report + ranked (card alpha 0.55) to foreground the patch without hiding the other two
closure_modifiers.amber_discipline: ACCENT only on (a) patch label + add-line strip in beat C, (b) lockup second line, (c) hairline dividers; block_08 keeps the diff-hero payoff
closure_modifiers.no_new_evidence: no timeline, no artifact grid, no moment spike — investigation is closed
closure_modifiers.reviewability_cue: explicit annotation 'human reviews · system does not auto-apply' under patch in beat C

beats.name: bundle intro
beats.content: DELIVERABLE eyebrow, 'not just a summary' hero, bundle path data/final_runs/sanfer_tunnel/, three staggered empty slot placeholders

beats.name: three outputs
beats.content: staggered reveal (0.2/0.7/1.2s) of forensic report card (title + exec summary prose + counts), ranked outcome card (5 confidence bars from real hypotheses), scoped patch card (real engage_gate.py hunk)

beats.name: reviewability
beats.content: report + ranked dimmed to 0.55 alpha; patch card full ACCENT strip + 'human reviews · applies / system does not auto-apply' annotation

beats.name: lockup
beats.content: 'not just a summary.' (FG) / 'ready for review.' (ACCENT) + 'forensic report · ranked outcome · scoped patch' subtitle + brand lockup

source_assets_used: data/final_runs/sanfer_tunnel/report.md (real post-mortem: case sanfer_tunnel, duration 3626.70s, model claude-opus-4-7, 5-row executive summary with confidences 0.60 / 0.55 / 0.35 / 0.15 / 0.05)
ranked hypotheses verbatim: #1 sensor_timeout ROOT 0.60, #2 missing_null_check 0.55, #3 other 0.35, #4 latency_spike 0.15, #5 other REFUTED 0.05
report prose excerpt: 'Moving-baseline RTCM uplink... carr_soln never leaves none · 18,133/18,133 NAV-RELPOSNED'
patch hunk: localization/engage_gate.py can_engage guard (trimmed from the full hunk used in block_08 to fit the card at 540px wide)
text_overlays_used: the system hands over a bundle an engineer can open and act on
